{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Gelbus Griffiss
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Gelbus Griffiss]] is the Curator of the [[Hall of Champions]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c25">''The Knight'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Gelbus was seen with tears in his eyes.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c25" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
